title: Qwen3-TTS 12Hz 0.6B Base 4-bit MLX Model Card
citation: MLX Community. Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-0.6B-Base-4bit model card. Hugging Face. Accessed 2026-05-06.
permitted_uses: Planning and local cache-evidence source for the approved developer-only Qwen3-TTS MLX outbound speech fallback.
claims_supported: The model card identifies the model license as Apache-2.0.
The model card identifies the model as a 4-bit MLX conversion for Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-0.6B-Base.
The model card describes use through mlx-community tooling and Hugging Face downloads.
The Hugging Face API metadata captured on 2026-05-06 reports source revision 0d6bb6fe33f92d47a507e23b9148940e8366ab5b and lists model.safetensors plus speech_tokenizer/model.safetensors.
claims_not_supported: That Qwen3-TTS is a full-duplex dialog system or ASR model.
That the model is clinically validated for medical education.
That the model has been downloaded, benchmarked, or connected to OpenClinXR runtime evidence.
